title: Mutants & Mystics: Science Fiction, Superhero Comics, and the Paranormal
author: Jeffrey J. Kripal
card_summary: Jeffrey Kripal examines the deep connections between paranormal experience and the creation of science fiction and superhero comics. Through case studies of authors and artists including Philip K. Dick, Kripal argues that popular culture genres encode genuine encounters with the extraordinary, functioning as modern forms of mythological and mystical expression.
